title: Add beads_rust (br) CLI Support Integration
description: Migrate yolo-runner from Python beads (bd) CLI to beads_rust (br) CLI for task tracking. This involves updating the adapter, documentation, and ensuring all existing functionality works with the new Rust-based CLI.

title: Analyze bd vs br CLI command differences
description: Document all differences between Python beads (bd) and beads_rust (br) CLI commands. Identify which commands need changes in the adapter (ready, show, list, update, close, sync, etc.).

title: Create new br.go adapter alongside existing beads.go
description: Modify internal/beads/beads.go to use 'br' commands instead of 'bd' commands. Ensure all methods (Ready, Tree, Show, UpdateStatus, Close, Sync, etc.) work correctly with beads_rust CLI output format.

title: Update AGENTS.md with beads_rust documentation
description: Add beads_rust usage instructions to AGENTS.md. Include br CLI commands, installation, and migration notes from bd to br.

title: Test beads_rust integration end-to-end
description: Run full integration tests with beads_rust. Verify epic/task creation, status updates, and yolo-agent compatibility with the new br backend.
